batch_summary: Joey teases Chandler about dating his sister, Mary Angela. Meanwhile, Rachel returns home hoping for a call from Mark, but she and Monica are instead driven out of the apartment by loud, suggestive squeaking noises from Phoebe's date upstairs. Elsewhere, Ross scolds Chandler for trying to break up with Mary Angela via a letter, warning him of Joey's wrath. Ross insists Chandler do it in person, leading a stressed Chandler to reluctantly knock on her door.

Uncomfortable with the loud sounds, Rachel and Monica quickly decide to go for a walk to escape the situation. Elsewhere, Ross reads a poorly written breakup letter Chandler drafted for Mary Angela. Ross warns Chandler that Joey will be furious if he breaks up with his sister through a letter, especially since Chandler is confused about which sister is actually Mary Angela. Ross convinces a reluctant Chandler that he must break the news in person. The segment ends with Chandler arriving at the family home, nervously knocking on the door to face Mary Angela.

batch_summary: Chandler arrives at Joey's house to break up with Mary Angela, only to be welcomed warmly by Joey. Meanwhile, at the coffee shop, Rachel laments that Mark hasn't called. Monica encourages Rachel to call him since he gave her his home number, much to Ross's hidden jealousy. Rachel takes the advice and dials Mark.
